videos.headline: Darius Taylor muscles his way into the end zone for a Minnesota TD
videos.description: Darius Taylor muscles his way into the end zone to score a rushing touchdown for Minnesota in the final seconds before halftime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Darius Taylor muscles his way into the end zone for a Minnesota TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Max Brosmer finds Darius Taylor for Minnesota TD
videos.description: Max Brosmer finds Darius Taylor, who gets into the end zone to put Minnesota up 13-0 vs. Nevada.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Max Brosmer finds Darius Taylor for Minnesota TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET
